prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Shadowrun / Sixth World inspired cyberpunk urban-fantasy atlas for the terrain type dual_continent.
Scene/backdrop: two major cyberpunk continents separated by uneven dark seas and narrow straits, filled with sprawling metropolitan districts, megacorp arcology towers, barrens slums, matrix access node hubs, gang territory borders, smuggling docks, toxic industrial corridors, awakened wilderness zones, dragon-run enclaves and corporate extraterritorial zones.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated cyberpunk atlas, dark neon city-district cartography, rain-slick dystopian mood, Matrix overlay hexagons, corporate glow, perpetual night, urban fantasy map design.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map, asymmetric continents of different sizes; the sea separation is diagonal and S-shaped with C-shaped gulfs, L-shaped channels and jagged straits, not a simple vertical divider; include digital compass, circuit border, transit lines, smuggling routes, corporate-zone icons and Matrix node overlays without readable text.
Geography constraints: realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, capes, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, polluted estuaries, inland seas, seawalls and varied landforms; span megacity sprawl, rain forests, deserts, mountains, toxic wetlands, coastal docks, awakened forests, corporate arcology belts and barrens wastelands.
Avoid: clean utopian sci-fi, medieval fantasy map, mirrored continents, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
